project.name: Pretotyping MVP
project.description: A local-first workspace for turning screen captures, IA notes, and natural-language requests into clickable prototype versions.

screens.name: Discover - Market Overview
screens.summary: Long mobile discovery screen with market cards, stock rankings, ETF rankings, and topic sections.
screens.notes: Use as the best source for long-scroll screen handling.
